title: scholar-simulate items document
description: Survey/vignette/conjoint items plus the shared instruction and the user-turn template.

system.description: Global instruction prepended to every system prompt (before the persona scaffold). Cacheable across personas.

task_template.description: User-turn template. Placeholders: {item_text}, {options}, plus any extra item fields by name.

item_id.description: Stable item identifier; appears in each response's custom_id and joins to the benchmark.

text.description: The question / vignette / conjoint prompt text.

options.description: Response options (Likert labels, etc.). Omit for open-ended.
